evidence: "I loved the Outlander books and the series does a very good job of following the books..."
"the script wasn't quite as good (IMO) as the first movie..."
"it doesn't follow the book much - they made some changes to the story and to the main characters."
"the reality part seemed heavily scripted and rather unlikely."
"I would have liked to have seen Will Smith follow up in this one- I did miss him in it- but the movie did fine without him."
"the scenery in this show was stunning, especially in HD."
"It gave a well thought out rendition of what likely happened from Mary's perspective..."
"this video made me angry at Monsanto..."

summary: The user enjoys historical dramas and fantasy genres, appreciating well-executed adaptations and high production quality. They have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, but they value emotional resonance in the content they consume.
